returns.description: Current datetime string in format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS
Today's date in ISO format YYYY-MM-DD

description: Returns the current Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch).
Converts a Unix timestamp to a formatted datetime string.

returns.description: Formatted datetime string or 'invalid timestamp' on error

description: Adds seconds to a base time and returns a formatted result.

base_time.description: (optional) base time as numeric timestamp or ISO string; if omitted, uses now()

returns.description: Formatted datetime string or error message on invalid inputs

description: Returns time until target as 'in Xd Xh Xm Xs' or 'X ago'.

target.description: Target time as numeric timestamp or ISO string

returns.description: Human-readable time delta like 'in 1d 2h' or '3m 5s ago', or 'invalid target'

description: Converts an ISO datetime or timestamp to a target IANA timezone (e.g. 'Europe/Berlin').

dt.description: ISO datetime string or numeric timestamp

returns.description: ISO formatted datetime in target timezone, or error string on failure

description: Returns the weekday name for the given date (ISO date or datetime).

date_str.description: ISO date or datetime string (YYYY-MM-DD or full ISO)

returns.description: Weekday name (e.g. 'Monday') or 'invalid date' on error
